texto: All disciplines of science are built on the causality of the relationships governing related events. Yet the theory of evolution is built upon the idea of accidental changes that resulted in complex living systems. I was unable to comprehend how the notion that an infinite number of random accidents systematically happened to produce living species, and kept improving these beings, is justified.
explicacao: Citação de T.H. Janabi sobre temas ligados a vida. “All disciplines of science are built on the causality of the relationships governing related even…” articula vida, biology, darwin em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e termino.
